evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all frontend rules

assertions.trap: 'use client' on whole page that could be server component
assertions.description: 'use client' only for hooks/event handlers, not entire pages

assertions.trap: useEffect to sync filteredProducts from products+search
assertions.description: Derive state during render, not in useEffect

assertions.trap: key={index} on dynamic product list
assertions.description: Stable IDs for keys, never array index on dynamic lists

assertions.trap: isPrimary/isGhost/isCompact boolean props
assertions.description: Variant prop with defined values, not boolean mode props

assertions.trap: Import from '../index' barrel file
assertions.description: Direct imports, no barrel files

assertions.trap: Types in global @/types/ instead of with feature
assertions.description: Types colocated with feature, not global types/ dump

assertions.trap: forwardRef pattern (deprecated in React 19)
assertions.description: React 19: ref is regular prop, no forwardRef

assertions.trap: if (isLoading) return <Spinner/> pattern
assertions.description: Suspense-first with useSuspenseQuery, not isLoading early returns

assertions.trap: Hardcoded colors/padding in inline styles
assertions.description: Design tokens, never hardcoded colors/spacing

assertions.trap: useStore() full destructure
assertions.description: useStore(s => s.field) selector, never destructure full store

assertions.trap: products.length === 0 renders null
assertions.description: Every list needs an empty state

assertions.trap: No debounce on search input onChange
assertions.description: Debounce search 300-500ms

assertions.trap: Inline fetch in useEffect instead of isolated api layer
assertions.description: No inline fetch; isolate in feature api/ layer

assertions.trap: Types, hooks, render mixed up in component
assertions.description: File order: types -> hooks -> useMemo -> useCallback -> render -> export

assertions.trap: div onClick without keyboard nav/role/aria
assertions.description: Semantic HTML, ARIA labels, keyboard navigation

assertions.trap: Server-side fetch() without cache: 'no-store' or revalidate in ProductLoader
assertions.description: Next.js fetch() caches by default in prod; add { cache: 'no-store' } or revalidate

assertions.trap: ProductSidebar and ProductDetail receive selectedId via prop drilling from parent
assertions.description: Compound components (Context+Provider) for sibling shared state, never prop-drill

assertions.trap: renderHeader prop on ProductCard instead of children
assertions.description: Children over renderX props; render props only when passing data back

assertions.trap: No ErrorBoundary wrapping the component tree
assertions.description: Error Boundaries with retry for resilient UI

assertions.trap: ProductLoader passes entire Product[] objects to client component instead of only needed fields
assertions.description: Minimize RSC boundary serialization, pass only needed fields

assertions.trap: alert() for form validation instead of inline field error
assertions.description: Error hierarchy: inline (field) > toast (recoverable) > banner > full screen

assertions.trap: Submit button not disabled during async submission, no loading indicator
assertions.description: Disable buttons + loading indicator during async submission

assertions.trap: Rendering all filteredProducts without virtualization (potentially >50 items)
assertions.description: Virtualize >50 items with @tanstack/react-virtual

assertions.trap: Static import of heavy ProductChart component (200KB charting lib)
assertions.description: next/dynamic for heavy components, lazy load charts/modals

assertions.trap: Modal has no focus trap and does not restore focus to trigger on close
assertions.description: Focus trap modals, restore focus to trigger on close

assertions.trap: .low-contrast-hint has #aaa on #fff — fails WCAG 2.1 AA contrast ratio
assertions.description: WCAG 2.1 AA contrast ratios must be met

assertions.trap: CSS animation with transform/scale and no @media (prefers-reduced-motion) override
assertions.description: prefers-reduced-motion: disable transforms, opacity only
